name: TC-TXN-008 — Transaction list: display_status casing must be consistent across all records
description:
`display_status` in the list uses title-case ("Success", "Failed") while `gateway_status` in the detail endpoint uses ALL-CAPS ("SUCCESS", "FAILED").

This test confirms the inconsistency exists across the list endpoint and validates that all `display_status` values follow a single consistent casing convention.
